response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages including Python, JavaScript, and D, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source tooling — but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at enterprise scale, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages (TypeScript, D, C++, Python) and systems
Proven leadership in open-source tooling and developer infrastructure (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong data and systems thinking from high-throughput telemetry and real-time services at Dunnhumby
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation frameworks or feature flighting systems
Lacks documented experience with AI tools accelerating engineering velocity or growth metrics
Limited visibility into cross-team stakeholder alignment or enterprise-scale rollout risk controls
